sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, unix_time Int64, formatted_date String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, 1234334543, fromUnixTimestampInJodaSyntax(1234334543, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 'UTC'));
UPDATE test_dates SET formatted_date = fromUnixTimestampInJodaSyntax(unix_time, 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss', 'Europe/London') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestampInJodaSyntax(unix_time, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm', 'America/New_York') AS formatted_date FROM test_dates;
